title: Inheritance of field resistance to sorghum downy mildew
abstract: Inheritance of SDM resistance was studied in a set of resistant x susceptible crosses using both quantitative and quantitative genetic analysis techninues. Segregatiod ratios in the (R x S) crosses clearly indicated the presence of three gene pairs which exhibited both complementary and duplicator types of gene interaction among them. Quantitive genetic analysis of this character indicated similar results. SDM resistance was observed to be quantitive threshold character
publication: Indian Journal of Genetics and Plant Breeding
